'''Black Wing Squadron''', was an [[Special forces/Legends|elite]] [[Fighter wing/Legends|fighter wing]] serving on board the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Chimaera/Legends|''Chimaera'']]. It was led by [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Creb]], who based the [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] off of [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]], an elite wing of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. It composed of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]]. It would notably fight at the [[Battle of Bilbringi (9 ABY)|Battle of Bilbringi]], which saw the [[Death/Legends|death]] of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]].
